GEOVANNY PEÑALOZA

Full Stack Developer | .NET Core, C#, Flutter | Cloud & SQL

Ecuador
Tu imagen

About Me

Junior Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in developing web and mobile applications using .NET (C#), Flutter, and SQL-based systems. Possesses a strong understanding of the complete software development lifecycle, including API design, database management, and modern frontend technologies.

Experienced in developing real-world solutions through freelance projects, including a scalable GPS tracking system and a fully customized e-commerce platform. Capable of working independently, managing development processes, and delivering functional, business-oriented systems.

Highly motivated to advance into senior software engineering roles, with a focus on continuous learning, emerging technologies, and AI-driven development.

4+ Completed Projects
1+ Years of Experience
7+ Technologies

Experience

Nov 2025 - Present

Full Stack Developer

Freelance - Ecuador

Designed and developed real-world software solutions including a scalable GPS tracking system with real-time monitoring, alerts, route history, and live map visualization. Built cross-platform mobile and web applications using Flutter, and contributed to backend development with C# and ABP Framework. Implemented queue-based, multi-process architectures to handle high concurrency and ensure fault tolerance. Developed a custom e-commerce platform with advanced UI/UX and integrated Nequi payment system.

Aug 2024 - Nov 2024

IT Support & Systems Intern

Ikiam Amazonian Regional University - Ecuador

Managed servers, databases, and internal systems within the IT department. Performed OS installations (Linux/Windows) and system maintenance. Executed SQL-based database tasks and supported infrastructure operations, ensuring system reliability and operational continuity across the university's technology infrastructure.

Feb 2024 - Aug 2024

IT & Systems Intern

Tena Higher Technological Institute - Ecuador

Supported deployment of an academic management system for institutional use. Identified and resolved system issues through bug fixing and validation processes. Created comprehensive technical documentation and user manuals to support system adoption and streamline operational workflows.

Feb 2022 - Aug 2022

IT Support Intern

Archidona Municipal Government - Ecuador

Implemented and maintained an internal messaging system for institutional communication. Managed system functionality across Windows environments with Linux-based backend infrastructure. Ensured system stability and operational continuity, supporting daily municipal operations and digital transformation initiatives.

Sep 2021 - Dec 2021

IT Systems Intern

Institute of Popular and Solidarity Economy - Ecuador

Assisted in system management and internal technical operations. Supported workflow organization and system usage across departments. Delivered digital literacy training to older adults, promoting technology adoption and building confidence in digital tools among diverse audiences.

Projects

📍

GPS Tracking System

Developed a scalable GPS tracking system with real-time monitoring, alerts, route history, and live map visualization. Implemented a multi-process, high-availability architecture supporting thousands of concurrent users. Built cross-platform web and mobile apps using Flutter, with a C# backend powered by ABP Framework. Designed a fault-tolerant system isolating user-level failures without impacting overall performance.

Flutter C# ABP Framework
GitHub Private
🛍️

Kyomu Space

Built a custom e-commerce platform for a Colombian women-focused store with full product catalog, user profiles, and shopping cart functionality. Designed an advanced UI/UX and integrated the Nequi payment gateway for secure, seamless transactions. Delivered a complete end-to-end shopping experience from browsing to checkout.

WordPress Nequi API
Visit website
💻

EduCode

Developed a native Android application for structured programming education. Designed core concept modules with interactive assessments to accelerate learning. Implemented guided paths, hands-on exercises, and progress tracking. Enabled scalable, measurable skill development in software fundamentals.

Flutter Android
Private Project
🎮

System Overload Bit

Developed a 2D simulation game combining evasion and precision mechanics with hybrid controls (keyboard and mouse). Designed a reactive environment where players dodge stochastic entities and capture targets under time pressure. Implemented algorithmic logic to handle randomness and dynamic gameplay behavior. Focused on precision, performance, and responsive game mechanics.

Python Pygame
